definitions.ja: 最適化ループは、フィードバック、指標、スコア、レビュー所見、学習信号を消費し、後続の経路、ツール選択、プロンプト、ポリシー閾値、タスク試行を改善する境界付きフィードバックループです。

OptimizationTarget.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: states the measurable property an evaluator-optimizer loop is trying to improve, such as correctness, latency, cost, safety, or coverage.
definitions.zh: 优化目标说明评估器-优化器循环试图改进的可测属性，例如正确性、延迟、成本、安全性或覆盖度。
definitions.ja: 最適化対象は、評価器・最適化ループが改善しようとする測定可能な性質を示します。正確性、遅延、コスト、安全性、カバレッジなどが該当します。

OptimizerState.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: runtime-visible state of an evaluator-optimizer loop, including current attempt, selected feedback, budget, stopping context, and candidate quality.
definitions.zh: 优化者状态是评估优化循环的运行可见状态，包含当前尝试、选定反馈、预算、停止上下文和候选质量。
definitions.ja: 最適化状態は、評価最適化ループの実行時に見える状態で、現在の試行、選ばれたフィードバック、予算、停止文脈、候補品質を含みます。

orchestration_actors_delegation_contains.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: declares agent as tool invocation and sibling terms as members of the Coordination Roles And Delegation module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明工具式智能体调用及其同级术语属于协同角色与委派模块范围。
definitions.ja: 道具型エージェント呼び出しと同階層の用語が協調ロールと委任モジュールの範囲に属することを宣言します。

orchestration_actors_delegation_emits_ev.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Coordination Roles And Delegation module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把协同角色与委派模块中的操作连接到可观察轨迹事件记录。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュール内の操作を観測可能なトレースイベント記録へ結びます。

orchestration_actors_delegation_has_evid.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Coordination Roles And Delegation module.
definitions.zh: 记录协同角色与委派模块中声明的证据支持强度。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールに付く主張の証拠支持の強さを記録します。

orchestration_actors_delegation_has_stat.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: captures the lifecycle or operating state of terms in the Coordination Roles And Delegation module.
definitions.zh: 记录协同角色与委派模块中术语的生命周期或运行状态。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュール内の用語のライフサイクルまたは運用状態を記録します。

orchestration_actors_delegation_relates.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: connects agent as tool invocation to answer ownership when both participate in model coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets.
definitions.zh: 当工具式智能体调用与答案归属共同参与协同角色、委派契约、交接、工具式调用、授权范围、上下文隔离、归属、工作者选择和委派预算时，将二者连接。
definitions.ja: 道具型エージェント呼び出しと回答帰属が、協調ロール、委任契約、引き継ぎ、道具型呼び出し、権限範囲、文脈隔離、帰属、作業者選択、委任予算に共に関わるとき、両者を結びます。

orchestration_composition_contains.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: declares aggregation rule and sibling terms as members of the Composition Patterns module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

orchestration_composition_emits_event.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Composition Patterns module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュール内の観測可能な操作を実行トレースイベントへ接続します。

orchestration_composition_has_evidence_s.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Composition Patterns module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录附着在该模块声明上的来源支撑强度。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュールの主張に付与された出典支援の強さを記録します。

orchestration_composition_has_state.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures the lifecycle or operating state of terms in the Composition Patterns module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录该模块中术语的生命周期状态或运行状态。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュール内の用語のライフサイクル状態または運用状態を記録します。

orchestration_composition_relates.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects aggregation rule to chain stage when both participate in model prompt chains, parallelization, sectioning, voting, and synthesis patterns.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

orchestration_evaluation_contains.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: declares critique artifact and sibling terms as members of the Control Feedback Loop module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明批评产物及其同级术语属于控制反馈循环模块范围。
definitions.ja: 批評成果物と同階層の用語が制御フィードバックループモジュールの範囲に属することを宣言します。

orchestration_evaluation_emits_event.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Control Feedback Loop module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把控制反馈循环模块中的操作连接到可观察轨迹事件记录。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュール内の操作を観測可能なトレースイベント記録へ結びます。

orchestration_evaluation_has_evidence_st.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Control Feedback Loop module.
definitions.zh: 记录控制反馈循环模块中声明的证据支持强度。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュールに付く主張の証拠支持の強さを記録します。

orchestration_evaluation_has_state.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: captures the lifecycle or operating state of terms in the Control Feedback Loop module.
definitions.zh: 记录控制反馈循环模块中术语的生命周期或运行状态。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュール内の用語のライフサイクルまたは運用状態を記録します。

orchestration_evaluation_relates.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: connects critique artifact to evaluator optimizer when both participate in model evaluator-optimizer control loops, review triggers, feedback routing, visible deliberation operations, revisions, and bounded stop or retry lineage.
definitions.zh: 当批评产物与评估优化者共同参与评估优化控制循环、审查触发、反馈路由、可见审议、修订和停止重试脉络时，将二者连接。
definitions.ja: 批評成果物と評価最適化役が、評価最適化制御ループ、レビュー発火、フィードバック経路、可視の検討操作、修正、停止再試行の系譜に共に関わるとき、両者を結びます。

orchestration_routing_control_contains.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: declares branch condition and sibling terms as members of the Routing And Control module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

orchestration_routing_control_emits_even.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Routing And Control module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュール内の観測可能な操作を実行トレースイベントへ接続します。

orchestration_routing_control_has_eviden.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Routing And Control module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录附着在该模块声明上的来源支撑强度。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュールの主張に付与された出典支援の強さを記録します。

orchestration_routing_control_has_state.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures the lifecycle or operating state of terms in the Routing And Control module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录该模块中术语的生命周期状态或运行状态。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュール内の用語のライフサイクル状態または運用状態を記録します。

orchestration_routing_control_relates.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects branch condition to downstream operation when both participate in model gates, routes, control policies, branching, and downstream operation selection.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

orchestration_task_planning_contains.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: declares goal and sibling terms as members of the Task Planning module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

orchestration_task_planning_emits_event.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Task Planning module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词把该模块中的可观察操作连接到运行轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュール内の観測可能な操作を実行トレースイベントへ接続します。

orchestration_task_planning_has_evidence.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Task Planning module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录附着在该模块声明上的来源支撑强度。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュールの主張に付与された出典支援の強さを記録します。

orchestration_task_planning_has_state.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures the lifecycle or operating state of terms in the Task Planning module.
definitions.zh: 该数据字段记录该模块中术语的生命周期状态或运行状态。
definitions.ja: このデータ項目は、当該モジュール内の用語のライフサイクル状態または運用状態を記録します。

orchestration_task_planning_relates.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: connects goal to objective when both participate in model tasks, decomposition, work items, plans, and task dependencies.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接该模块内共同参与同一语义范围的类。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、同じ意味範囲に参加するモジュール内のクラス同士を接続します。

orchestration-actors-delegation.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: models coordination roles, delegation contracts, handoffs, agents-as-tools, authority scope, context isolation, ownership, worker selection, and delegation budgets
definitions.zh: 协同角色与委派模块属于控制与编排域，用于描述编排者、工作者、子智能体、交接、把智能体作为工具调用、上下文隔离、授权范围、责任归属、工作者选择和委派预算。
definitions.ja: 協調ロールと委任モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、調整役、作業者、サブエージェント、引き継ぎ、エージェントを道具として呼び出す形、文脈隔離、権限範囲、責任帰属、作業者選択、委任予算を記述します。

orchestration-composition.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: models prompt chains, parallelization, sectioning, voting, and synthesis patterns
definitions.zh: 组合模式模块属于控制与编排域，描述提示链、并行、分段、投票、聚合或综合等任务分解与结果合成机制。它聚合 13 个类。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 構成パターンモジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、プロンプトチェーン、並列化、分割、投票、集約、統合などのタスク分解と結果合成機構を記述する。13 個のクラスを束ねます。出典 3 件。

orchestration-evaluation.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: models evaluator-optimizer control loops, review triggers, feedback routing, visible deliberation operations, revisions, and bounded stop or retry lineage
definitions.zh: 控制反馈循环模块属于控制与编排域，用于描述审查触发、反馈路由、可见审议步骤、修订计划、改进尝试以及停止或重试的控制脉络，而不拥有基准评分本身。
definitions.ja: 制御フィードバックループモジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、レビューの発火、フィードバック経路、可視の検討手順、修正計画、改善試行、停止または再試行の制御上の系譜を記述し、ベンチマーク採点そのものは所有しません。

orchestration-plane.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration top-level definition aligned to ownership, routing, topology, synthesis, and bounded feedback-loop semantics.

definitions.en: Control & Orchestration Domain is the operational concern domain for transforming goals into executable, delegated, routed, reviewed, and synthesized workflows. It models objectives, task plans, delegation ownership, handoffs, agents-as-tools, context isolation, worker selection, routing targets, gates, topology, prompt chains, parallel composition, synthesis provenance, and bounded feedback or retry loops.
definitions.zh: 控制与编排域是把目标转化为可执行、可委派、可路由、可审查和可综合工作流的运行关注域。它描述可操作目标、任务计划、委派归属、交接、智能体作为工具调用、上下文隔离、工作者选择、路由目标、闸门、拓扑、提示链、并行组合、综合来源，以及有边界的反馈或重试循环。
definitions.ja: 制御とオーケストレーションドメインは、目標を実行、委任、経路づけ、レビュー、統合が可能なワークフローへ変換する運用関心ドメインです。操作可能な目的、タスク計画、委任帰属、引き継ぎ、エージェント道具呼び出し、文脈隔離、作業者選択、経路目標、ゲート、構造、プロンプト連鎖、並列構成、統合来歴、境界付きフィードバックまたは再試行ループを記述します。

orchestration-routing-control.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: models gates, routes, control policies, branching, and downstream operation selection
definitions.zh: 路由与控制模块属于控制与编排域，根据状态、策略、条件或观察结果选择下一步操作、分支、参与者、工具或停止路径。它聚合 10 个类。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 経路と制御モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、状態、ポリシー、条件、観測結果に基づき、次の操作、分岐、参加者、ツール、停止経路を選択する。10 個のクラスを束ねます。出典 3 件。

orchestration-task-planning.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: models tasks, decomposition, work items, plans, and task dependencies
definitions.zh: 任务规划模块属于控制与编排域，表达目标、任务、计划、工作项、步骤、依赖、约束和完成准则，并支持可观测进度追踪。它聚合 11 个类。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: タスク計画モジュールは制御とオーケストレーションドメインに属し、目標、タスク、計画、作業項目、手順、依存、制約、完了基準を表し、観測可能な進捗追跡を支える。11 個のクラスを束ねます。出典 3 件。

OrchestrationTopology.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: describes the coordination shape of a workflow, such as centralized manager-worker, hierarchical crew, graph route, parallel branch, or dynamic swarm.
definitions.zh: 编排拓扑描述工作流的协同形态，例如中心化管理者与工作者、层级团队、图式路由、并行分支或动态群组。
definitions.ja: オーケストレーション構造は、中央管理者と作業者、階層チーム、グラフ経路、並列分岐、動的集団など、ワークフローの協調形態を記述します。

Orchestrator.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: coordination role that decomposes goals, chooses workflow topology, delegates work, routes control, tracks ownership, and synthesizes results.
definitions.zh: 编排者是一种协同角色，负责拆解目标、选择工作流拓扑、委派工作、路由控制、追踪归属并综合结果。
definitions.ja: オーケストレータは協調ロールであり、目標分解、ワークフロー構造の選択、委任、制御経路、帰属追跡、結果統合を担います。

OSWorldAdapter.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: maps OSWorld computer-use environments, desktop tasks, execution observations, success checks, and environment pressure into canonical runtime, tool, artifact, and evaluation terms.
definitions.zh: OSWorld 适配器把计算机使用环境、桌面任务、执行观察、成功检查和环境压力映射到规范运行、工具、产物和评估术语。
definitions.ja: OSWorld アダプタは、コンピュータ利用環境、デスクトップタスク、実行観測、成功確認、環境負荷を、標準実行、ツール、成果物、評価用語へ対応付けます。

OutboundRequest.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records a boundary-crossing outbound request from a tool, sandbox, protocol adapter, or remote-agent interaction, including target endpoint, method, credential scope, data zone, and policy decision.
definitions.zh: 出站请求记录来自工具、沙箱、协议适配器或远程智能体交互的跨边界请求，包含目标端点、方法、凭据范围、数据区和策略决策。
definitions.ja: 送信要求は、ツール、サンドボックス、プロトコルアダプタ、遠隔エージェント相互作用からの境界越え要求を記録し、宛先端点、メソッド、資格情報範囲、データ区域、ポリシー判断を含みます。

OutputChunk.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: represents a bounded segment of command, tool, model, process, or artifact output prepared for citation, truncation, disclosure, or later context staging.
definitions.zh: 输出分块表示命令、工具、模型、进程或产物输出中有边界的一段，用于引用、截断、披露或在后续步骤中暂存进上下文。
definitions.ja: 出力チャンクは、コマンド、ツール、モデル、プロセス、成果物の出力に含まれる境界付きの一部であり、引用、切り詰め、開示、後続手順でのコンテキストステージングに使われます。

OutputCitation.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links visible output or a disclosed segment to the source span, retrieval candidate, trace event, or artifact that supports it.
definitions.zh: 输出引用把可见输出或已披露片段连接到支撑它的来源片段、检索候选、轨迹事件或产物。
definitions.ja: 出力引用は、可視出力または開示済みセグメントを、それを支える出典断片、検索候補、トレースイベント、成果物へ結び付けます。

OutputSegment.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: records an addressable segment within an output stream with ordering, source, visibility, and optional citation metadata.
definitions.zh: 输出片段记录输出流中可寻址的一段，并带有顺序、来源、可见性和可选引用元数据。
definitions.ja: 出力セグメントは、出力ストリーム内のアドレス可能な一部を記録し、順序、出典、可視性、任意の引用メタデータを持ちます。

OutputStream.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: records an ordered stream of output segments produced by a model, command, process, or tool before windowing or disclosure.
definitions.zh: 输出流记录模型、命令、进程或工具在窗口化与披露之前产生的有序输出片段序列。
definitions.ja: 出力ストリームは、モデル、コマンド、プロセス、ツールがウィンドウ化や開示の前に生成した順序付き出力セグメント列を記録します。

OutputWindow.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: identifies the visible or retained range of output that may be shown, cited, summarized, or passed into later context.
definitions.zh: 输出窗口标识可被显示、引用、摘要或传入后续上下文的输出保留范围。
definitions.ja: 出力ウィンドウは、表示、引用、要約、後続コンテキストへの受け渡しが可能な出力の保持範囲を識別します。

overrides_instruction.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links an authorized instruction override to the lower-priority or narrower instruction it replaces or limits.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

OWLExportAdapter.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: projects canonical ontology terms into OWL/RDF export artifacts while keeping OWL axioms and semantic reasoning separate from the canonical structural JSON schema contract.
definitions.zh: OWL 导出适配器把规范本体术语投影为 OWL/RDF 导出产物，同时保持 OWL 公理和语义推理与规范 JSON 结构契约分离。
definitions.ja: OWL エクスポートアダプタは、標準オントロジー用語を OWL/RDF エクスポート成果物へ投影し、OWL 公理と意味推論を標準 JSON 構造契約から分離します。

ParallelBranch.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: one branch in a parallelized workflow with its own assigned work, context slice, output, and merge expectations.
definitions.zh: 并行分支是并行工作流中的一个分支，具有自己的分配工作、上下文切片、输出和合并预期。
definitions.ja: 並列分岐は、並列ワークフロー内の一分岐であり、割り当て作業、文脈片、出力、結合期待を持ちます。

Parallelization.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: orchestration pattern that runs multiple branches, sections, workers, or candidate attempts concurrently under a shared control objective.
definitions.zh: 并行化是在共享控制目标下同时运行多个分支、分段、工作者或候选尝试的编排模式。
definitions.ja: 並列化は、共有された制御目的の下で複数の分岐、区分、作業者、候補試行を同時に走らせるオーケストレーションパターンです。

part_of.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: DAG relation that states that a component belongs to a larger plane, system, session, trace, or process
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为任意实体，值域为任意实体；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が任意エンティティ、値域が任意エンティティです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

part_of_conversation.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a message or turn to the conversation or thread that supplies ordering and continuity.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

participates_in.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: event relation that connects an actor, tool, resource, model, or policy to a runtime event
definitions.zh: 参与事件是参与关系，定义域为对象或参与者，值域为事件类；把参与者、工具、资源、模型或策略连接到运行事件。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: イベント参加は参加関係で、定義域はオブジェクトまたは参加者、値域はイベント類です。参加者、ツール、リソース、モデル、ポリシーを実行イベントへ結び付ける。出典 2 件。

participates_in_session.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links a runtime actor identity to the session in which it acts, observes, authorizes, generates, retrieves, ranks, reviews, or executes.
definitions.zh: 把运行参与者身份连接到其行动、观察、授权、生成、检索、排序、审查或执行所在的会话。
definitions.ja: 実行アクター識別を、それが行動、観測、承認、生成、検索、順位付け、レビュー、実行を行うセッションへ接続します。

PatchArtifact.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: artifact form that represents a proposed or applied code, document, configuration, or data change together with source and execution provenance.
definitions.zh: 补丁产物表示拟议或已应用的代码、文档、配置或数据变更，并携带来源与执行溯源。
definitions.ja: パッチ成果物は、提案済みまたは適用済みのコード、文書、設定、データ変更を表し、出典と実行来歴を伴います。

PatternScan.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: event that examines text, tool output, commands, or streams for injection signatures and policy violations
definitions.zh: 模式扫描是注入防御模块中的事件类，描述工具的注册、发现、匹配、参数、调用、执行结果、错误、警告和可观测副作用。所属平面：信頼、ポリシー、安全ドメイン。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: パターンスキャンは注入防御モジュール内のイベント類で、ツールの登録、発見、照合、引数、呼び出し、実行結果、エラー、警告、観測可能な副作用を記述する。所属平面：信頼、ポリシー、安全ドメイン。出典 2 件。

pauses_with_snapshot.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links a pause event to the state snapshot retained so the runtime can later resume or inspect the paused session.
definitions.zh: 把暂停事件连接到被保留的状态快照，使运行时之后可以恢复或检查暂停的会话。
definitions.ja: 一時停止イベントを保持された状態スナップショットへ接続し、後で一時停止セッションを再開または検査できるようにします。

PermissionPrompt.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records a request for authority before an action proceeds, including requesting actor, operation, protected resource, scope, decision options, and approval channel.
definitions.zh: 权限提示记录动作执行前的授权请求，说明请求者、请求操作、受保护资源、作用范围、可选决策以及审批通道。
definitions.ja: 権限プロンプトは、操作の実行前に出される認可要求を記録し、要求者、要求操作、保護対象、範囲、判断選択肢、承認経路を示します。

PermissionResponse.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records the response to a permission prompt, including allow, deny, escalate, conditionally allow, expiry, user or policy authority, and traceable rationale.
definitions.zh: 权限响应记录权限提示的结果，包括允许、拒绝、升级、有条件允许、失效时间、用户或策略权限来源以及可追溯理由。
definitions.ja: 権限応答は、権限プロンプトへの結果として、許可、拒否、エスカレーション、条件付き許可、有効期限、ユーザーまたはポリシーの権限源、追跡可能な理由を記録します。

PermissionScope.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: bounds a single permission request or response by naming the requested operation, protected resource, actor, data zone, trust boundary, duration, and allowed side effects.
definitions.zh: 权限作用域限定一次权限请求或响应，明确请求操作、受保护资源、参与者、数据区、信任边界、持续时间和允许的副作用。
definitions.ja: 権限スコープは、一回の権限要求または応答を、要求操作、保護対象、参加者、データ区域、信頼境界、期間、許可された副作用によって限定します。

PolicyAction.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: describes the enforcement action chosen by a policy decision, such as allow, deny, redact, quarantine, require approval, route to sandbox, limit network egress, or escalate.
definitions.zh: 策略动作描述策略决策选择的执行动作，例如允许、拒绝、脱敏、隔离、要求批准、转入沙箱、限制网络出口或升级。
definitions.ja: ポリシーアクションは、許可、拒否、秘匿、隔離、承認要求、サンドボックスへの経路変更、ネットワーク送信制限、エスカレーションなど、ポリシー判断が選ぶ執行動作を表します。

PolicyCondition.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: states a safety policy predicate over subject actor, requested operation, protected resource, data zone, trust boundary, policy basis, runtime state, and enforcement mode.
definitions.zh: 策略条件说明安全策略在主体参与者、请求操作、受保护资源、数据区、信任边界、策略依据、运行状态和执行模式上的判断谓词。
definitions.ja: ポリシー条件は、主体参加者、要求操作、保護対象、データ区域、信頼境界、ポリシー根拠、実行状態、執行モードに関する安全ポリシーの述語を表します。

PolicyDecision.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records the concrete allow, deny, escalate, redact, quarantine, sandbox, or approval-required outcome produced by evaluating a policy rule against a requested operation.
definitions.zh: 策略决策记录策略规则针对某个请求操作产生的具体结果，例如允许、拒绝、升级、脱敏、隔离、转入沙箱或要求人工批准。
definitions.ja: ポリシー判断は、要求された操作に対してポリシールールを評価した結果として、許可、拒否、エスカレーション、秘匿、隔離、サンドボックス実行、承認要求などを記録します。

PolicyException.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records a bounded exception to a policy rule with exception scope, authorized actor, protected resource, expiration, revocation condition, compensating control, and audit reason.
definitions.zh: 策略例外记录对某条策略规则的有边界豁免，包含例外范围、被授权参与者、受保护资源、过期时间、撤销条件、补偿控制和审计原因。
definitions.ja: ポリシー例外は、ポリシールールへの限定的な例外を記録し、例外範囲、認可された参加者、保護対象、有効期限、失効条件、補償制御、監査理由を含みます。

PolicyRule.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: defines a safety or governance rule that can evaluate actor authority, requested operation, protected resource, data zone, trust boundary, runtime context, and enforcement action.
definitions.zh: 策略规则定义安全或治理约束，用于评估参与者权限、请求操作、受保护资源、数据区、信任边界、运行上下文和执行动作。
definitions.ja: ポリシールールは安全または統制の制約を定義し、参加者の権限、要求操作、保護対象、データ区域、信頼境界、実行時文脈、執行アクションを評価します。

precedes.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: orders observable events when one event occurs before another in a run, task, or protocol flow.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

PreferenceMemory.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: preference memory stores stable user or task preferences that can guide context assembly without becoming hidden reasoning.
definitions.zh: 偏好记忆是上下文组装模块中的资源类，表达目标、任务、计划、工作项、步骤、依赖、约束和完成准则，并支持可观测进度追踪。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 選好記憶はコンテキスト組み立てモジュール内のリソース類で、目標、タスク、計画、作業項目、手順、依存、制約、完了基準を表し、観測可能な進捗追跡を支える。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 3 件。

ProcessHandle.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: identifies the operating-system process reference used to monitor, stop, or correlate an execution attempt.
definitions.zh: 进程句柄标识用于监视、停止或关联某次执行尝试的操作系统进程引用。
definitions.ja: プロセスハンドルは、実行試行を監視、停止、関連付けるためのオペレーティングシステム上のプロセス参照を識別します。

ProcessPolicy.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: defines process execution constraints such as command allowlist, argument limits, environment exposure, timeout, retry policy, resource limits, and sandbox escape handling.
definitions.zh: 进程策略定义命令白名单、参数限制、环境暴露、超时、重试、资源限制和沙箱逃逸处理等执行约束。
definitions.ja: プロセスポリシーは、コマンド許可リスト、引数制限、環境公開、タイムアウト、再試行、リソース制限、サンドボックス脱出対応などの実行制約を定義します。

produced_by_command_execution.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links command output observation to the runtime command execution event that produced it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

produces_artifact.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: event relation that connects an action, retrieval, tool call, or synthesis to an output artifact
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为事件类，值域为资源类；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がイベント類、値域がリソース類です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

produces_synthesis_output.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: links a synthesis event to the coherent answer, artifact, summary, plan, or decision it produces.
definitions.zh: 综合输出关系把综合事件连接到其产生的一致答案、产物、摘要、计划或决策。
definitions.ja: 統合出力関係は、統合イベントを、それが生み出す一貫した回答、成果物、要約、計画、決定へ結びます。

ProgrammaticToolCall.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: tool invocation produced by generated code, runtime orchestration, or explicit API logic rather than direct natural-language selection
definitions.zh: 程序化工具调用是工具调用与执行模块中的事件类，描述工具的注册、发现、匹配、参数、调用、执行结果、错误、警告和可观测副作用。所属平面：能力与资源调用域。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: プログラム的ツール呼び出しはツール呼び出しと実行モジュール内のイベント類で、ツールの登録、発見、照合、引数、呼び出し、実行結果、エラー、警告、観測可能な副作用を記述する。所属平面：能力とリソース呼び出しドメイン。出典 2 件。

ProgressiveDisclosure.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records a controlled release pattern in which content is revealed in stages under policy, trust-boundary, and context-window constraints.
definitions.zh: 渐进披露记录在策略、信任边界和上下文窗口约束下分阶段释放内容的控制模式。
definitions.ja: 段階的開示は、ポリシー、信頼境界、コンテキストウィンドウの制約下で内容を段階的に公開する制御パターンを記録します。

PromptChain.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: ordered sequence of prompt or model-call stages used to decompose, transform, verify, or synthesize work while preserving stage provenance.
definitions.zh: 提示链是有序的提示或模型调用阶段序列，用于拆解、转换、验证或综合工作，并保留阶段来源。
definitions.ja: プロンプト連鎖は、作業を分解、変換、検証、統合するための順序付きプロンプトまたはモデル呼び出し段階で、段階の来歴を保ちます。

PromptInjectionSignal.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records evidence that a message, source span, retrieved content, or tool result contains instructions attempting to override trusted instructions, manipulate tool arguments, exfiltrate data, or bypass policy.
definitions.zh: 提示注入信号记录消息、来源片段、检索内容或工具结果中试图覆盖可信指令、操纵工具参数、外泄数据或绕过策略的证据。
definitions.ja: プロンプト注入信号は、メッセージ、出典範囲、検索内容、ツール結果に、信頼済み指示の上書き、ツール引数の操作、データ持ち出し、ポリシー回避を試みる指示が含まれる証拠を記録します。

PromptTemplateInstance.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: records one filled prompt template instance with bindings, source references, and authority metadata used in a context package.
definitions.zh: 提示模板实例记录一次已填充的提示模板，包括绑定、来源引用和用于上下文包的权威元数据。
definitions.ja: プロンプトテンプレート実体は、束縛、出典参照、コンテキストパッケージで使われる権威メタデータを含む、充填済みの一回分のテンプレートを記録します。

PromptVariable.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: identifies a named placeholder in a prompt template and the source value or binding that populates it for a model call.
definitions.zh: 提示变量标识提示模板中的具名占位符，以及为模型调用填充该占位符的来源值或绑定。
definitions.ja: プロンプト変数は、プロンプトテンプレート内の名前付きプレースホルダーと、モデル呼び出し時にそこへ入る出典値または束縛を識別します。

ProtocolAdapter.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: adapter membrane component that maps protocol-native envelopes, messages, tasks, capabilities, identity, and trust metadata to canonical agent-system terms without importing protocol fields into core.
definitions.zh: 协议适配器是适配膜中的组件，用于把协议原生包络、消息、任务、能力、身份和信任元数据映射到规范智能体系统术语，而不把协议字段导入核心。
definitions.ja: プロトコルアダプタはアダプタ膜の構成要素で、プロトコル固有の包絡、メッセージ、タスク、能力、識別、信頼メタデータを標準エージェントシステム用語へ写像し、プロトコル項目をコアへ取り込みません。

ProtocolCapabilityMapping.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: aligns protocol capability advertisements with tool, resource, prompt, actor, and permission surfaces exposed across a protocol boundary.
definitions.zh: 协议能力映射把协议中的能力声明对齐到跨协议边界暴露的工具、资源、提示、参与者和权限表面。
definitions.ja: プロトコル能力写像は、プロトコル上の能力広告を、境界を越えて公開されるツール、資源、プロンプト、アクター、権限面へ対応付けます。

ProtocolEnvelope.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: captures protocol-level wrapping around a message, including task identity, sender, receiver, artifact references, and capability metadata without promoting adapter-specific fields into core.
definitions.zh: 协议包络捕获消息外层的任务身份、发送方、接收方、产物引用和能力元数据，同时避免把适配器专有字段提升为核心术语。
definitions.ja: プロトコル包絡は、メッセージ外側のタスク識別子、送信者、受信者、成果物参照、能力メタデータを捕捉しつつ、アダプタ固有項目を中核語彙へ昇格させません。

ProtocolMessageMapping.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: aligns protocol-specific message envelopes with canonical message, artifact, actor, and trace concepts without making protocol fields part of core.
definitions.zh: 协议消息映射把协议特有消息包络对齐到规范消息、产物、参与者和追踪概念，同时保持协议字段在核心之外。
definitions.ja: プロトコルメッセージ写像は、プロトコル固有のメッセージ包絡を標準メッセージ、成果物、アクター、トレース概念へ対応付け、プロトコル項目をコア外に保ちます。

ProtocolTaskMapping.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: aligns protocol task lifecycle states with canonical goals, tasks, work items, artifacts, and observable trace events.
definitions.zh: 协议任务映射把协议任务生命周期状态对齐到规范目标、任务、工作项、产物和可观察追踪事件。
definitions.ja: プロトコルタスク写像は、プロトコル上のタスクライフサイクル状態を標準目標、タスク、作業項目、成果物、観測可能なトレースイベントへ対応付けます。

ProtocolTrustMapping.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: aligns protocol identity, authentication, authorization, and opacity metadata with trust-boundary and authority-scope concepts.
definitions.zh: 协议信任映射把协议身份、认证、授权和不透明性元数据对齐到信任边界与权限范围概念。
definitions.ja: プロトコル信頼写像は、プロトコル上の識別、認証、認可、不透明性メタデータを、信頼境界と権限範囲の概念へ対応付けます。

Proxy.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: represents a controlled proxy surface that mediates outbound or inbound traffic according to network policy, credential scope, logging, and data-zone constraints.
definitions.zh: 代理表示受控网络中介表面，根据网络策略、凭据范围、日志记录和数据区约束调解入站或出站流量。
definitions.ja: プロキシは、ネットワークポリシー、資格情報範囲、ログ記録、データ区域制約に従って入出力トラフィックを仲介する制御面を表します。

ProxyRoute.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records the controlled proxy path used for network traffic, including proxy kind, target endpoint, allowed protocol, credential boundary, egress policy, and trace evidence.
definitions.zh: 代理路由记录网络流量使用的受控代理路径，包括代理类型、目标端点、允许协议、凭据边界、出口策略和轨迹证据。
definitions.ja: プロキシ経路は、ネットワークトラフィックに使われる制御されたプロキシ経路を記録し、プロキシ種別、宛先端点、許可プロトコル、資格情報境界、送信ポリシー、トレース証跡を含みます。

PydanticProfileAdapter.review_note: Interoperability & Adapter Domain rework aligned to the adapter membrane evaluation: protocol, framework, benchmark, statechart, schema/export, mapping direction, source provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: projects canonical schemas into Pydantic schema profiles such as BaseModel and TypeAdapter JSON Schema output, separating Pydantic schema conversion from framework-specific agent runtime semantics.
definitions.zh: Pydantic 剖面适配器把规范模式投影为基础模型类、类型适配器等模式输出，并明确这里处理的是模式转换而不是特定框架的智能体运行语义。
definitions.ja: Pydantic プロファイルアダプタは、標準スキーマを基底モデル型や型アダプタなどのスキーマ出力へ投影し、ここで扱うのはスキーマ変換であって特定フレームワークのエージェント実行意味ではないことを明確にします。

QuarantineAction.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records an action that isolates content, tool output, retrieved memory, or artifact from normal context and execution flow until review or policy resolution.
definitions.zh: 隔离动作记录把内容、工具输出、检索记忆或产物从正常上下文和执行流中隔离，直到完成审查或策略解决。
definitions.ja: 隔離アクションは、内容、ツール出力、検索メモリ、成果物を通常のコンテキストと実行フローから分離し、レビューまたはポリシー解決まで保持することを記録します。

ranked_by_score.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a retrieved context candidate to the score or rank evidence used during context selection.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

RankFusion.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: ranking event that combines retrieved candidates from multiple indexes, models, or scoring methods
definitions.zh: 排序融合是检索与排序模块中的事件类，记录由文本、分块、图或工具描述编码得到的稠密、稀疏或词汇表征，用于索引、比较、检索和排序。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 順位融合は検索と順位付けモジュール内のイベント類で、テキスト、チャンク、グラフ、ツール記述から符号化された密、疎、語彙表現を記録し、索引、比較、検索、順位付けに用いる。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 2 件。

ranks.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a ranking event to the candidate set, result list, or scored resource it orders.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

RecoveryAction.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: feedback-triggered or failure-triggered action such as repair, retry, reroute, stop, escalate, rollback, or resume that responds to a warning, denial, failed attempt, or review finding.
definitions.zh: 恢复动作是由反馈或失败触发的修复、重试、改路、停止、升级、回滚或恢复执行等动作，用来响应警告、拒绝、失败尝试或审查发现。
definitions.ja: 復旧アクションは、フィードバックまたは失敗を起点とする修復、再試行、経路変更、停止、エスカレーション、ロールバック、再開などの動作で、警告、拒否、失敗試行、レビュー所見に応答します。

RecoveryPlan.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: plan that selects one or more recovery actions, links them to the failure or feedback evidence that triggered them, and bounds retry, rollback, escalation, or stop behavior.
definitions.zh: 恢复计划选择一个或多个恢复动作，把它们连接到触发它们的失败或反馈证据，并约束重试、回滚、升级或停止行为。
definitions.ja: 復旧計画は、一つ以上の復旧アクションを選び、それらを起点となった失敗またはフィードバック証拠に結び付け、再試行、ロールバック、エスカレーション、停止の範囲を定めます。

redacted_by_policy.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links content to the policy rule that removed or masked sensitive spans before disclosure or context staging.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

Redaction.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: records the operation that masks, removes, replaces, summarizes, or withholds sensitive content before it is shown, exported, stored, or sent across a boundary.
definitions.zh: 脱敏记录在内容被展示、导出、存储或跨边界发送之前，对敏感内容进行掩码、移除、替换、总结或保留不披露的操作。
definitions.ja: 秘匿は、内容が表示、エクスポート、保存、境界越え送信される前に、機微内容をマスク、削除、置換、要約、または非開示にする操作を記録します。

RedactionRule.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: defines a policy rule for detecting, masking, suppressing, summarizing, or replacing sensitive spans before content crosses an output or trust boundary.
definitions.zh: 脱敏规则定义在内容跨越输出或信任边界之前，如何检测、掩码、抑制、总结或替换敏感片段。
definitions.ja: 秘匿ルールは、内容が出力境界または信頼境界を越える前に、機微範囲を検出、マスク、抑制、要約、置換する方法を定義します。

ReflectionRecord.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: observable review summary or rationale artifact used for improvement while excluding private reasoning transcripts.
definitions.zh: 反思记录是用于改进的可观察审查摘要或理由产物，不保存私有推理记录。
definitions.ja: 内省記録は改善に使う観測可能なレビュー要約または理由成果物であり、私的な推論記録は保存しません。

released_to_boundary.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a disclosed output segment to the trust boundary or external boundary it is allowed to cross.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

remote_agent_crosses_trust_boundary.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links an opaque remote agent reference to the trust boundary crossed by task, message, artifact, or status exchange.
definitions.zh: 把不透明远程智能体引用连接到任务、消息、产物或状态交换所跨越的信任边界。
definitions.ja: 不透明な遠隔エージェント参照を、タスク、メッセージ、成果物、状態交換が越える信頼境界へ接続します。

RemoteAgentBoundary.review_note: Trust, Policy & Safety Domain revision aligned with the Phase 1C safety evaluation, auditable safety propagation graph, and trilingual canonical definitions.

definitions.en: marks the opacity, identity, authority, and accountability trust boundary created when work, messages, tasks, or artifacts are delegated to or received from a remote agent.
definitions.zh: 远程智能体边界不是参与者本身，而是本地系统与远程智能体交换任务、消息、状态或产物时形成的不透明性、身份、权限和责任边界。
definitions.ja: 遠隔エージェント境界は参加者そのものではなく、ローカルシステムが遠隔エージェントとタスク、メッセージ、状態、成果物を交換するときに生じる不透明性、識別、権限、責任の信頼境界です。

RemoteAgentReference.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: opaque reference to a remote agent participant whose identity, authority, task state, and artifacts are visible while its private tools, memory, and reasoning remain outside the local runtime.
definitions.zh: 远程智能体引用是不透明的远程参与者引用，本地运行期可见其身份、权限、任务状态和产物，但其私有工具、记忆和推理仍在本地运行边界之外。
definitions.ja: 遠隔エージェント参照は不透明な遠隔参加者への参照であり、識別、権限、タスク状態、成果物は見える一方、私的なツール、記憶、推論はローカル実行境界の外にあります。

replay_event_replays_trace.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links a replay event to the trace record replayed for debugging, evaluation, reproduction, review, or audit.
definitions.zh: 把回放事件连接到为了调试、评估、复现、审查或审计而被回放的追踪记录。
definitions.ja: 再生イベントを、デバッグ、評価、再現、レビュー、監査のために再生されたトレース記録へ接続します。

ReplayEvent.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: observable event that replays a trace, span, session segment, checkpoint, or artifact lineage for debugging, evaluation, reproduction, or review.
definitions.zh: 回放事件记录为了调试、评估、复现或审查而回放追踪、跨度、会话片段、检查点或产物谱系的可观测事件。
definitions.ja: 再生イベントは、デバッグ、評価、再現、レビューのためにトレース、スパン、セッション区間、チェックポイント、成果物系譜を再生する観測可能イベントを記録します。

reply_to.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a message to the prior message or turn it answers, corrects, extends, or cites.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

ReplyTo.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: records the prior message or turn that a message responds to so conversation structure is not reduced to a flat list.
definitions.zh: 回复指向记录某条消息回应的先前消息或轮次，避免把会话结构压平成无关系列表。
definitions.ja: 返信先は、あるメッセージが応答する先行メッセージまたはターンを記録し、会話構造が単なる平坦な一覧になることを防ぎます。

ReportArtifact.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: artifact form that summarizes findings, evaluations, evidence, decisions, or progress produced by a runtime session or review pass.
definitions.zh: 报告产物汇总运行会话或审查过程产生的发现、评估、证据、决策或进展。
definitions.ja: 報告成果物は、実行セッションまたはレビュー過程で生成された所見、評価、証拠、判断、進捗を要約します。

requires_permission.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: safety relation that connects an action or event to an authorization prompt or policy requirement
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为事件类，值域为权限提示；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がイベント類、値域が権限プロンプトです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

RerankerModel.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: model actor specialized for reordering retrieved candidates, tool options, source spans, or answer candidates using relevance evidence.
definitions.zh: 重排序模型是模型参与者的排序型专门化，用相关性证据重新排列检索候选、工具选项、来源片段或答案候选。
definitions.ja: 再ランキングモデルは、関連性証拠を用いて検索候補、ツール候補、出典範囲、回答候補を並べ替えることに特化したモデルアクターです。

reranks_result.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: memory relation that reorders retrieved candidates using a model or scoring method
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为重排模型模型，值域为已检索分块；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が再順位付けモデルモデル、値域が検索済みチャンクです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

RerankScore.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: rerank score records query-time retrieval, candidate construction, scoring, reranking, and selection evidence for context or tool choice.
definitions.zh: 重排评分是检索与排序模块中的资源类，描述工具的注册、发现、匹配、参数、调用、执行结果、错误、警告和可观测副作用。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 再順位付けスコアは検索と順位付けモジュール内のリソース類で、ツールの登録、発見、照合、引数、呼び出し、実行結果、エラー、警告、観測可能な副作用を記述する。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 3 件。

Resource.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: represents an addressable information, capability, storage, or artifact surface that may be described, referenced, retrieved, or governed by policy.
definitions.zh: 资源表示可被描述、引用、检索或受策略治理的信息、能力、存储或产物表面。
definitions.ja: 資源は、記述、参照、検索、方針統制が可能な情報、能力、保存、成果物の表面を表します。

ResourceDescriptor.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: summarizes identity, type, provenance, location, access hints, and trust metadata for a source or resource reference staged into context.
definitions.zh: 资源描述符概括暂存进上下文的来源或资源引用的身份、类型、溯源、位置、访问提示和信任元数据。
definitions.ja: 資源記述子は、コンテキストへステージングされる出典または資源参照の識別子、種別、来歴、位置、アクセス手掛かり、信頼メタデータを要約します。

ResponsibilityTransfer.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: records which responsibility changes owner during delegation or handoff, including task custody, control custody, answer ownership, and audit accountability.
definitions.zh: 责任转移记录委派或交接期间哪些责任更换所有者，包括任务保管、控制保管、答案归属和审计责任。
definitions.ja: 責任移転は、委任または引き継ぎの間にどの責任の所有者が変わるかを記録し、タスク管理、制御管理、回答帰属、監査責任を含みます。

restore_event_restores_checkpoint.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links a checkpoint restore event to the checkpoint used to rehydrate state, pending writes, or interrupted work.
definitions.zh: 把检查点恢复事件连接到用于重新装载状态、待写入内容或中断工作的检查点。
definitions.ja: チェックポイント復元イベントを、状態、保留書き込み、中断された作業を再水和するために使われたチェックポイントへ接続します。

resumes_from_checkpoint.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links a session resume event to the checkpoint used to restore state, pending work, and execution context.
definitions.zh: 把会话恢复事件连接到用于恢复状态、待处理工作和执行上下文的检查点。
definitions.ja: セッション再開イベントを、状態、保留作業、実行文脈の復元に使われたチェックポイントへ接続します。

retains_answer_ownership.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: links an agent-as-tool invocation to the ownership record showing the managing agent remains accountable for the final answer.
definitions.zh: 答案归属保留关系把工具式智能体调用连接到记录管理者仍对最终答案负责的归属记录。
definitions.ja: 回答帰属保持関係は、道具型エージェント呼び出しを、管理者が最終回答に責任を残すことを示す帰属記録へ結びます。

retries_from_attempt.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: links stop-retry lineage to the improvement attempt from which the next bounded retry or revision is derived.
definitions.zh: 重试来源关系把停止重试脉络连接到派生下一次有边界重试或修订的改进尝试。
definitions.ja: 再試行由来関係は、停止再試行系譜を、次の境界付き再試行または修正が派生する改善試行へ結びます。

RetrievalFilter.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: retrieval filter records query-time retrieval, candidate construction, scoring, reranking, and selection evidence for context or tool choice.
definitions.zh: 检索过滤器是检索与排序模块中的资源类，描述工具的注册、发现、匹配、参数、调用、执行结果、错误、警告和可观测副作用。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 検索フィルタは検索と順位付けモジュール内のリソース類で、ツールの登録、発見、照合、引数、呼び出し、実行結果、エラー、警告、観測可能な副作用を記述する。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 3 件。

RetrievalQuery.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: query event that requests relevant memory, chunks, graph nodes, database records, or text passages
definitions.zh: 检索查询是检索与排序模块中的事件类，描述文档、输出、消息或记忆项的可检索分块、边界、重叠、来源、定位说明和质量信号。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 検索クエリは検索と順位付けモジュール内のイベント類で、文書、出力、メッセージ、記憶項目の検索可能なチャンク、境界、重なり、来歴、根拠メモ、品質信号を記述する。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 2 件。

RetrievalScore.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: records relevance, confidence, similarity, lexical match, or rerank evidence attached to a retrieved context candidate.
definitions.zh: 检索评分记录附加在检索上下文候选上的相关性、置信度、相似度、词汇匹配或重排证据。
definitions.ja: 検索スコアは、検索コンテキスト候補に付く関連度、信頼度、類似度、語彙一致、再順位付け根拠を記録します。

RetrievalTrace.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: retrieval trace records query-time retrieval, candidate construction, scoring, reranking, and selection evidence for context or tool choice.
definitions.zh: 检索轨迹是检索与排序模块中的资源类，描述工具的注册、发现、匹配、参数、调用、执行结果、错误、警告和可观测副作用。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 3 项。
definitions.ja: 検索トレースは検索と順位付けモジュール内のリソース類で、ツールの登録、発見、照合、引数、呼び出し、実行結果、エラー、警告、観測可能な副作用を記述する。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 3 件。

RetrievedCandidate.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: represents content returned by retrieval before the system decides whether it enters the context package.
definitions.zh: 检索候选表示系统决定是否纳入上下文包之前，由检索返回的候选内容。
definitions.ja: 検索候補は、コンテキストパッケージに入れるかどうかを決める前に検索から返された候補内容を表します。

RetrievedChunk.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: chunk returned by a retrieval query with score, rank, provenance, or context metadata
definitions.zh: 已检索分块是检索与排序模块中的资源类，描述文档、输出、消息或记忆项的可检索分块、边界、重叠、来源、定位说明和质量信号。所属平面：记忆与上下文持久化域。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 検索済みチャンクは検索と順位付けモジュール内のリソース類で、文書、出力、メッセージ、記憶項目の検索可能なチャンク、境界、重なり、来歴、根拠メモ、品質信号を記述する。所属平面：記憶とコンテキスト永続化ドメイン。出典 2 件。

RetrievedContextCandidate.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: represents a retrieved candidate evaluated specifically for inclusion in a model-call or agent-step context package.
definitions.zh: 检索上下文候选表示专门针对某次模型调用或智能体步骤上下文包进行纳入评估的检索候选。
definitions.ja: 検索コンテキスト候補は、特定のモデル呼び出しまたはエージェント手順のコンテキストパッケージへ入れるか評価される検索候補を表します。

retrieves.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a retrieval event to the memory record, source chunk, or indexed resource it returns.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

retrieves_chunk.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: memory relation that returns relevant chunks for a query or context assembly
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为检索查询，值域为已检索分块；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が検索クエリ、値域が検索済みチャンクです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

RetryableError.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: identifies an error that may be retried under bounded policy because the failure is transient, recoverable, or externally caused.
definitions.zh: 可重试错误标识在有界策略下可以重试的错误，因为失败是临时的、可恢复的或由外部原因造成。
definitions.ja: 再試行可能エラーは、失敗が一時的、復旧可能、または外部要因によるため、境界付きポリシー下で再試行できるエラーを示します。

RetryPolicy.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: policy bounding when an orchestration loop may retry work, including retry count, changed context, backoff, escalation, and failure conditions.
definitions.zh: 重试策略限定编排循环何时可重试工作，包括重试次数、变更上下文、退避、升级和失败条件。
definitions.ja: 再試行ポリシーは、オーケストレーションループがいつ作業を再試行できるかを限定し、回数、変更文脈、待機、エスカレーション、失敗条件を含みます。

returns.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a tool or action event to the result, error, artifact, or warning returned to the runtime.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

returns_tool_result.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: tool relation that connects a call to its observable result
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为工具调用，值域为工具结果；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がツール呼び出し、値域がツール結果です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

Review.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: bounded inspection record over a task, artifact, trace segment, plan, answer, tool result, or policy-sensitive decision that can produce findings, approvals, requested changes, or feedback.
definitions.zh: 审查是对任务、产物、轨迹片段、计划、答案、工具结果或策略敏感决策的有界检查记录，可产生发现、批准、修改请求或反馈。
definitions.ja: レビューは、タスク、成果物、トレース断片、計画、回答、ツール結果、ポリシー上重要な判断に対する境界付き検査記録であり、所見、承認、変更要求、フィードバックを生みます。

ReviewAssignment.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: assigns review responsibility to a human, model, evaluator, policy gate, or worker and identifies the artifact or decision under review.
definitions.zh: 审查分配把审查责任分配给人工、模型、评估者、策略闸门或工作者，并标识被审查的产物或决策。
definitions.ja: レビュー割り当ては、レビュー責任を人、モデル、評価者、ポリシーゲート、作業者へ割り当て、レビュー対象の成果物または決定を識別します。

ReviewerActor.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: runtime participant that inspects outputs, trace evidence, artifacts, or policy-sensitive decisions and records review findings or approval state.
definitions.zh: 审查参与者检查输出、追踪证据、产物或策略敏感决策，并记录审查发现或批准状态。
definitions.ja: レビューアクターは、出力、トレース証拠、成果物、ポリシー上注意を要する判断を検査し、レビュー所見または承認状態を記録する実行参加者です。

ReviewEvent.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: observable control-loop event that requests or performs review of an output, state, plan, safety condition, evidence bundle, or completion claim.
definitions.zh: 审查事件是可观察的控制循环事件，请求或执行对输出、状态、计划、安全条件、证据包或完成声明的审查。
definitions.ja: レビューイベントは観測可能な制御ループイベントで、出力、状態、計画、安全条件、証拠束、完了主張のレビューを依頼または実行します。

ReviewFinding.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: specific issue, observation, recommendation, defect, or approval note discovered during review and linked to the artifact, trace event, tool result, plan, or decision it concerns.
definitions.zh: 审查发现是在审查中发现的具体问题、观察、建议、缺陷或批准说明，并连接到其所涉及的产物、轨迹事件、工具结果、计划或决策。
definitions.ja: レビュー所見は、レビュー中に見つかった具体的な問題、観測、推奨、欠陥、承認メモであり、対象となる成果物、トレースイベント、ツール結果、計画、判断に結び付きます。

reviews_output.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: feedback relation that connects a review actor or event to the artifact or result being assessed
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为审查事件，值域为资源类；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がレビューイベント、値域がリソース類です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

RevisionPlan.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: planned remediation path that states what to change, which prior attempt it revises, and which criterion or feedback triggered the revision.
definitions.zh: 修订计划说明要改什么、修订哪一次先前尝试，以及由哪个准则或反馈触发。
definitions.ja: 修正計画は、何を変えるか、どの以前の試行を修正するか、どの基準またはフィードバックが契機かを示す計画された改善経路です。

RiskCritical.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: risk level "risk critical" used to rank safety, protocol, tool, network, or data-boundary exposure.
definitions.zh: 严重风险是风险等级个体，用于表达安全、协议、工具、网络或数据边界暴露强度。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 重大リスクはリスクレベル個体で、安全、プロトコル、ツール、ネットワーク、データ境界の露出強度を表します。出典 2 件。

RiskHigh.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: risk level "risk high" used to rank safety, protocol, tool, network, or data-boundary exposure.
definitions.zh: 高风险是风险等级个体，用于表达安全、协议、工具、网络或数据边界暴露强度。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 高リスクはリスクレベル個体で、安全、プロトコル、ツール、ネットワーク、データ境界の露出強度を表します。出典 2 件。

RiskLow.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: risk level "risk low" used to rank safety, protocol, tool, network, or data-boundary exposure.
definitions.zh: 低风险是风险等级个体，用于表达安全、协议、工具、网络或数据边界暴露强度。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 低リスクはリスクレベル個体で、安全、プロトコル、ツール、ネットワーク、データ境界の露出強度を表します。出典 2 件。

RiskMedium.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: risk level "risk medium" used to rank safety, protocol, tool, network, or data-boundary exposure.
definitions.zh: 中风险是风险等级个体，用于表达安全、协议、工具、网络或数据边界暴露强度。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: 中リスクはリスクレベル個体で、安全、プロトコル、ツール、ネットワーク、データ境界の露出強度を表します。出典 2 件。

RiskSignal.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: safety bridge signal recording evidence that an action, output, tool result, boundary crossing, instruction, or memory item may be policy-sensitive, unsafe, or trust-boundary relevant.
definitions.zh: 风险信号是安全桥接信号，记录动作、输出、工具结果、边界跨越、指令或记忆项可能涉及策略敏感、不安全或信任边界相关的证据。
definitions.ja: リスク信号は安全への橋渡し信号であり、アクション、出力、ツール結果、境界越え、指示、記憶項目がポリシー上重要、安全でない、または信頼境界に関係する可能性の証拠を記録します。

RobustnessMetric.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: metric dimension measuring stability under retries, perturbations, long-horizon tasks, tool failures, context changes, or adversarial pressure.
definitions.zh: 鲁棒性指标衡量系统在重试、扰动、长程任务、工具失败、上下文变化或对抗压力下的稳定性。
definitions.ja: ロバスト性指標は、再試行、摂動、長期タスク、ツール失敗、文脈変化、敵対的圧力下での安定性を測定します。

RollbackAction.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: action that reverses, compensates, or invalidates an unsafe side effect, state transition, artifact revision, memory update, route choice, or external operation under audit control.
definitions.zh: 回滚动作是在审计控制下反转、补偿或使不安全副作用、状态转换、产物修订、记忆更新、路由选择或外部操作失效的动作。
definitions.ja: ロールバックアクションは、監査制御の下で、安全でない副作用、状態遷移、成果物修正、記憶更新、経路選択、外部操作を反転、補償、無効化する動作です。

Route.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: control-flow edge or routing selection that sends work to a downstream actor, tool, branch, protocol, operation, or stop path.
definitions.zh: 路由是控制流边或路由选择，把工作发送到下游参与者、工具、分支、协议、操作或停止路径。
definitions.ja: 経路は制御フローの辺または経路選択であり、作業を下流の参加者、道具、分岐、プロトコル、操作、停止経路へ送ります。

routes.review_note: Context ingress and staging rework aligned with the Phase 1C evaluation, canonical ownership boundaries, and multilingual ontology definitions.

definitions.en: links a routing event to the downstream branch, handler, or operation selected for execution.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

routes_to_operation.review_note: Phase 1 definition ledger entry aligned to the canonical English definition, ontology boundary, relation endpoints, and registered source identifiers.

definitions.en: orchestration relation that sends work to a downstream operation, branch, tool, or agent
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为路由，值域为动作类；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域が経路、値域がアクション類です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

routes_to_target.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: links a route to the typed downstream target it selects, such as a worker, tool, branch, protocol adapter, operation, or stop path.
definitions.zh: 路由目标关系把路由连接到被选中的带类型下游目标，例如工作者、工具、分支、协议适配器、操作或停止路径。
definitions.ja: 経路目標関係は、経路を、選ばれた型付き下流目標へ結びます。例として作業者、道具、分岐、プロトコルアダプタ、操作、停止経路があります。

RoutingDecision.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: observable decision event that applies routing policy to select a routing target and record why that target was chosen.
definitions.zh: 路由决策是可观察决策事件，应用路由策略选择路由目标，并记录为何选择该目标。
definitions.ja: 経路決定は観測可能な決定イベントで、経路ポリシーを適用して経路目標を選び、その理由を記録します。

RoutingPolicy.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: policy used by orchestration to choose a branch, worker, tool, protocol, retry, escalation, or stop path from current state and evidence.
definitions.zh: 路由策略用于编排过程根据当前状态和证据选择分支、工作者、工具、协议、重试、升级或停止路径。
definitions.ja: 経路ポリシーは、現在状態と証拠に基づき、分岐、作業者、道具、プロトコル、再試行、エスカレーション、停止経路を選ぶために使われます。

RoutingTarget.review_note: Phase 1C control and orchestration rework: ownership, handoff versus agents-as-tools, routing targets, context isolation, delegation budgets, topology, synthesis provenance, and feedback-loop boundaries were reviewed against Phase 0 evidence.

definitions.en: typed endpoint selected by a route, such as a worker, subagent, tool, branch, protocol adapter, operation handle, or stop path.
definitions.zh: 路由目标是路由选择的带类型端点，例如工作者、子智能体、工具、分支、协议适配器、操作句柄或停止路径。
definitions.ja: 経路目標は、経路が選ぶ型付き端点であり、作業者、サブエージェント、道具、分岐、プロトコルアダプタ、操作ハンドル、停止経路などです。

Rubric.review_note: Observability & Feedback Domain rework aligned to the evaluation: observability evidence, feedback signal, review finding, metric/evaluation, logging pipeline, recovery, safety bridge signals, and benchmark-adapter boundaries were reviewed.

definitions.en: generic scoring guide that defines criteria, weights, thresholds, and interpretation rules for evaluation without embedding benchmark-specific leaderboard semantics.
definitions.zh: 评分规程是通用评分指南，定义评估准则、权重、阈值和解释规则，但不嵌入基准专属排行榜语义。
definitions.ja: ルーブリックは、評価の基準、重み、閾値、解釈規則を定める汎用採点ガイドであり、ベンチマーク固有のランキング意味論を埋め込みません。

run_attempt_belongs_to_task.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: links an execution attempt to the task or work item it realizes, keeping orchestration intent separate from observed runtime execution.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到它实际实现的任务或工作项，并保持编排意图与观测到的运行执行相互区分。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を、それが実現するタスクまたは作業項目へ接続し、編成上の意図と観測された実行を分離します。

RunAttempt.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: records one individual execution attempt within a session or task, including retry lineage, invoked inputs, observed events, and attempt-level status.
definitions.zh: 执行尝试记录会话或任务中的一次具体执行，包括重试谱系、被调用输入、观察到的事件和尝试级状态。
definitions.ja: 実行試行は、セッションまたはタスク内の一回の具体的な実行を記録し、再試行系譜、呼び出された入力、観測されたイベント、試行単位の状態を含みます。

RunOutcome.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: records the terminal result of a run attempt or session, including success, failure, cancellation, produced artifacts, and final observable state.
definitions.zh: 执行结果记录一次执行尝试或会话的终端结果，包括成功、失败、取消、产生的产物和最终可观测状态。
definitions.ja: 実行結果は、実行試行またはセッションの終端結果を記録し、成功、失敗、取消、生成された成果物、最終的に観測可能な状態を含みます。

runtime_actors_contains.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: declares actor authority scope and sibling terms as members of the Runtime Actor And Authority module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明该模块中的核心类及其同级术语属于相同的运行域导航范围。
definitions.ja: このモジュール内の中核クラスと同列の用語が同じ実行ドメインのナビゲーション範囲に属することを示します。

runtime_actors_emits_event.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Runtime Actor And Authority module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把该运行模块中的操作连接到可观测追踪事件记录，用于提示这些术语可能产生运行证据。
definitions.ja: この実行モジュール内の操作を観測可能なトレースイベント記録へ接続し、用語が実行証拠を生み得ることを示します。

runtime_actors_has_evidence_strength.review_note: Runtime State & Trace Domain rework aligned to Phase 0 evidence and the runtime evaluation: execution envelope, actor authority, trace/span/checkpoint structure, artifact provenance, and multilingual definition hygiene were reviewed.

definitions.en: captures source-support strength for claims attached to the Runtime Actor And Authority module.
